commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label, lacks required real behavior proof, and changes auth-provider/config status semantics.; Cleared: The diff touches auth-status logic and tests but does not add dependencies, workflow changes, secret handling expansion, or new third-party execution paths. (sha=7f725403d6fd2cfd31596ab272e2cab62b021ef2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch teaches `models status` to account for CLI runtime auth routes and adds regression tests for Gemini CLI OAuth status, image-route scoping, and provider/model-scoped login config.

PR surface: Source +62, Tests +196. Total +258 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible but not live-reproduced here: current `main` lacks CLI runtime auth accounting in `models status`, while docs and current provider setup define canonical `google/*` plus `google-gemini-cli` runtime as the expected OAuth path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains because the PR has a protected maintainer label, lacks required real behavior proof, and changes auth-provider/config status semantics.

target.title: fix(cli): show Gemini CLI runtime auth status
target.body:
## Summary
- include CLI runtime auth providers in `models status` runtime-auth accounting
- report canonical `google/*` text/default routes using `google-gemini-cli` as runtime auth routes while keeping image routes on Google API-key auth
- update Gemini CLI OAuth setup to write the existing provider/model-scoped `agentRuntime` policy on the default Google model instead of the ignored whole-agent runtime key
- add regression coverage for `GEMINI_API_KEY` plus Gemini CLI OAuth profile and for the login-generated config patch

Fixes #79585

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 2 files, 33 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

Signed head: `64a390f3706633b762c55f5f48ebb60e1cb60439`.

Note: I still have not run live Gemini CLI OAuth proof on this machine.
target.author: giodl73-repo
